title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire
posterAlt: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire (2005) movie poster
tmdbOverview: When his name emerges from the Goblet of Fire, Harry Potter becomes a competitor in a grueling battle for glory among three wizarding schools. Signs of Voldemort's return emerge as Harry's friends help him prepare for the Triwizard Tournament.
synopsis: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire is a 2005 adventure and fantasy film from United Kingdom and United States. It holds a solid 7.7 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
